response.original_title: Blacamán el bueno, vendedor de milagros
response.overview: A wandering showman known as Blacamán the Good sells miraculous cures to the poor and desperate, blurring the line between faith and fraud. Under the shadow of another, more sinister Blacamán, his life becomes a cycle of deception, where each miracle deepens his entrapment.
response.title: Blacamán el bueno, vendedor de milagros
